caption: A man with a buzzed haircut and a beard is speaking into a professional microphone in a recording studio. He is wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. Behind him is a wall covered in dark grey, vertically ribbed acoustic foam panels. The microphone is held by a silver shock mount that features the text "Rode NT1-A". Throughout the sequence, the man is talking, his mouth opening and closing as he speaks. He gestures with his right hand, which starts raised in the background, disappears from view, and then reappears as he makes a sweeping motion across the frame. His gaze remains focused forward and slightly to the side, while his facial expression shifts as he articulates his words. Tattoos are partially visible on his right arm.
